title: The Dawn Era (DISCONTINUED)
description: This modification will add many new prehistoric animals to your game.
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/VfJeknq.png)

**!!! THIS MOD REQUIRES AstemirLib !!!**  
**!!! May have issues with Optifine !!!**

The Dawn Era is a modification for Minecraft that brings many changes to your world.
The main one is the fauna of prehistoric times, which became extinct long ago, as it might seem at first glance. Explore the remains of past civilizations, hunt and tame, explore and discover with The Dawn Era!
Can you survive?

![Dinosaurs](https://i.imgur.com/oOPtqUv.png)

Now mod include this content:
15 new unique mobs, couple blocks and a lot of items.
All mobs spawn naturally.

![Fishes](https://i.imgur.com/dxlJxNN.png)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/xj3ZKUjMTH) ![Discord image](https://img.shields.io/discord/1130422369337479280?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord)

[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@_Xish_) ![Youtube image](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCuh7eieX8GFThgg3XlSt0Pw?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&label=Youtube&labelColor=red)
